product.name: ArWoWear T11 Chem Pro
product.categorySourceGroup: Vat Dyed Workwear Fabrics Resistant to Industrial Chemicals
product.titleDescriptor: 100% Cotton Twill, Chemical Resistant Fabric, 360 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 360 g/m², 100% Cotton, Vat Dyed, Chemical Resistant, 3/1S Twill Fabric
descriptions: ArWoWear T11 Chem Pro is heavy weight 360 g/m², vat dyed, chemical resistant,100% cotton merserized workwear fabric.
It is usefull for outdoor winter working conditions.
With water and oil repellent (TS EN ISO 4920) function.
Resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034)
100% Cotton Twill, Chemical Resistant Fabric, 360 gr/m'2
360 g/m², 100% Cotton, Vat Dyed, Chemical Resistant, 3/1S Twill Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>1600N; Weft>1000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>30N; Weft>25N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
